---
title: "sennet_liver"
author: "Team BMCR"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
editor: visual
execute: 
  eval: false
  echo: true
---

## Load libraries

```{r load-libaries}
library(Seurat)
BiocManager::install("sparseMatrixStats")
install.packages('Signac')
library(Signac)
# library(EnsDb.Hsapiens.v86)
library(dplyr)
BiocManager::install('glmGamPoi')
library(glmGamPoi)
library(patchwork)
BiocManager::install('scCustomize')
library(scCustomize) # custom scRNA-seq plots
library(ggplot2)
install.packages("glue")
library(glue)

```

## Load data

```{r}
# obtain RDS files and read into a list
file_list <- list.files("data", recursive = TRUE, pattern = "*.rds", full.names = TRUE)[2:5]
sample_name <- list.dirs("data/", full.names = FALSE)[2:5]
seu_list <- lapply(file_list, readRDS)

# assign names for each object in the list
names(seu_list) <- sample_name

# seu_list[1]
```

## Merge data from all samples

This is a time consuming step and there were many steps requiring troubleshooting.

### Correct indexing of ATAC fragments

```{r atac-index}
# Index fragment file
library(Rsamtools)

# Get list of files
atac_fragments_file <- list.files("data", recursive = TRUE, pattern = "*.tsv.gz$", full.names = TRUE)

# Index the fragment files
# fragment files should be in bgzip format for indexing

for (i in 1:length(atac_fragments_file)) {
  indexTabix(atac_fragments_file[[i]], format = "bed")
}

# Correct the path to the fragment file
for (i in 1:length(seu_list)) {
  # Remove the old link causing the "Cells already present" error
  Fragments(seu_list[[i]]) <- NULL
  
  # Create and add the new link
  Fragments(seu_list[[i]]) <- CreateFragmentObject(
    path = atac_fragments_file[i],
    cells = colnames(seu_list[[i]]),
    validate = TRUE
  )
}

```

### Correct Indexing of ATAC Fragments

Sample 2 had a distinct issue from the other samples where there were discordant number of cells in the Seurat object and fragment files. The steps below filters for common cells between the two and subset the data for indexing.

```{r}
i=2

# Get all unique cells present in the fragment file
# (Warning: this can be slow for very large files)
library(Signac)


message("Processing sample: ", names(seu_list)[i])
  
  # 1. Fast extract unique barcodes from the fragment file using terminal tools
  # This uses 'zcat', 'cut' to get the 4th column, and 'uniq' to get the list
  cmd <- paste0("zcat < ", atac_fragments_file[i], " | cut -f4 | sort | uniq")
  cells_in_fragment_file <- system(cmd, intern = TRUE)
  
  # 2. Identify the overlap
  # IMPORTANT: Check if you need to add/remove prefixes here!
  # If Seurat has "Sample1_", use: intersect(gsub(".*_", "", colnames(seu_list[[i]])), cells_in_fragment_file)
  current_seurat_cells <- colnames(seu_list[[i]])
  common_cells <- intersect(current_seurat_cells, cells_in_fragment_file)
  
  message("Found ", length(common_cells), " overlapping cells out of ", length(current_seurat_cells))
  
  # 3. Subset the Seurat object to only these common cells
  seu_list[[i]] <- subset(seu_list[[i]], cells = common_cells)
  
  # 4. Clear old fragment data and add the new link
  Fragments(seu_list[[i]]) <- NULL
  Fragments(seu_list[[i]]) <- CreateFragmentObject(
    path = atac_fragments_file[i],
    cells = colnames(seu_list[[i]]), # Now they match perfectly
    validate = FALSE                 # Fast, since we just verified them manually
  )

```

### Standardize ATAC peaks

```{r standardize-peaks}
library(GenomicRanges)

# 1. Get peaks from all objects
peaks_list <- lapply(seu_list, function(x) granges(x[["ATAC_MACS2"]]))

# 2. Combine and "reduce" (merge overlapping peaks into one)
combined_peaks <- reduce(unlist(as(peaks_list, "GRangesList")))

# 3. Quantify this new peak set in each sample
for (i in 1:length(seu_list)) {
  # Count fragments in the new unified peaks
  counts <- FeatureMatrix(
    fragments = Fragments(seu_list[[i]]),
    features = combined_peaks,
    cells = colnames(seu_list[[i]])
  )
  
  # Create a new Assay with the unified peaks
  seu_list[[i]][["ATAC"]] <- CreateChromatinAssay(
    counts = counts,
    fragments = Fragments(seu_list[[i]])
  )
}

```

### Merge objects

```{r merge-data}
# Final merge of seurat objects
liver <- merge(x = seu_list[[1]],
               y = seu_list[2:4],
               add.cell.ids = names(seu_list),
               merge.data = FALSE
               )

saveRDS(liver, "data/liver_seu_merged.rds")
# liver <- readRDS("data/liver_seu_merged.rds") # can run this to skip the other previous sections
```

## Some QC plots

These are nuclei data so the lack of mitochondria in the samples is expected.

```{r QC-plots}
liver[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(liver, pattern = "^MT-")

VlnPlot(liver, features = c("nCount_ATAC", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"), ncol = 3,
  log = TRUE, pt.size = 0) + NoLegend()
ggsave("fig/liver_QC.png", width = 8, height = 5)
```

![QC](fig/liver_QC.png)

## Filtering data from the QC

```{r data-filter}
liver_filtered <- subset(
  x = liver,
  subset = nCount_ATAC < 7e4 &
    nCount_ATAC > 1e3 &
    nCount_RNA < 50000 &
    nCount_RNA > 1000 &
    percent.mt < 10
)
```

### Adding metadata to the merged Seurat object

```{r meta-data}
meta <- liver_filtered@meta.data

meta <- meta |> 
  mutate(
    sennet_id = case_when(
      grepl("SN049H1", orig.ident) ~ "SNT323.JXVC.442",
      grepl("SN078H1", orig.ident) ~ "SNT575.PMHQ.397",
      grepl("SN087H1", orig.ident) ~ "SNT626.DNSL.944",
      grepl("SN091H1", orig.ident) ~ "SNT875.QRMN.232",
      TRUE ~ NA
      ),
    age = case_when(
      grepl("SN049H1", orig.ident) ~ 73,
      grepl("SN078H1", orig.ident) ~ 27,
      grepl("SN087H1", orig.ident) ~ 27,
      grepl("SN091H1", orig.ident) ~ 73,
      TRUE ~ NA
    ),
    sex = case_when(
      grepl("SN049H1", orig.ident) ~ "M",
      grepl("SN078H1", orig.ident) ~ "M",
      grepl("SN087H1", orig.ident) ~ "F",
      grepl("SN091H1", orig.ident) ~ "F",
      TRUE ~ NA
    ),
    age_group = case_when(
      age < 50 ~ "young",
      age > 50 ~ "old",
      TRUE ~ NA
    ),
    age_sex = glue::glue("{age}_{sex}")
  )

liver_filtered@meta.data <- meta
# liver_filtered$age_sex <- paste0(liver_filtered$age,"_",liver_filtered$sex)
```

### Process Joined Object (Seurat workflow)

```{r join-obj}
# RNA assay
DefaultAssay(liver_filtered) <- "RNA"
liver_filtered <- NormalizeData(liver_filtered)
liver_filtered <- FindVariableFeatures(liver_filtered, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000)
liver_filtered <- ScaleData(liver_filtered)
liver_filtered <- RunPCA(liver_filtered)

ElbowPlot(liver_filtered, ndims = 50)
N_PCS <- 30 # from elbow plot

liver_filtered <- RunUMAP(liver_filtered, 
                          dims = 1:N_PCS, 
                          reduction.name = 'umap.rna', 
                          reduction.key = 'rnaUMAP_')

# ATAC assay
DefaultAssay(liver_filtered) <- "ATAC"
liver_filtered <- RunTFIDF(liver_filtered)
liver_filtered <- FindTopFeatures(liver_filtered, min.cutoff = 'q0')
liver_filtered <- RunSVD(liver_filtered)
liver_filtered <- RunUMAP(liver_filtered, reduction = 'lsi', dims = 2:50, reduction.name = "umap.atac", reduction.key = "atacUMAP_")

# WNN
liver_filtered <- FindMultiModalNeighbors(liver_filtered, reduction.list = list("pca", "lsi"), dims.list = list(1:50, 2:50))
liver_filtered <- RunUMAP(liver_filtered, nn.name = "weighted.nn", reduction.name = "wnn.umap", reduction.key = "wnnUMAP_")
liver_filtered <- FindClusters(liver_filtered, graph.name = "wsnn", algorithm = 3, verbose = FALSE)
```

### Cluster Annotation

```{r}
devtools::install_github("satijalab/AzimuthAPI")
library(AzimuthAPI)
# library(SingleR)
# library(celldex)
# ref <- celldex::HumanPrimaryCellAtlasData()
liver_filtered <- CloudAzimuth(liver_filtered)
# saveRDS(liver_filtered, "data/liver_filtered_merged_annotated.rds")
```

### Visualization

```{r}
# UMAP of all cells and annotations
# DimPlot(liver_filtered, reduction = "umap.rna", label = TRUE) + NoLegend()

# UMAP grouped by sennet_id or patient
# DimPlot(liver_filtered, reduction = "umap.rna", group.by = "sennet_id")
DimPlot_scCustom(liver_filtered, 
                 reduction = "umap.rna", 
                 group.by = "sennet_id", 
                 ggplot_default_colors = TRUE)
ggsave("fig/UMAP_groupby_patient.png")

# UMAP grouped by age_sex
# DimPlot(liver_filtered, reduction = "umap.rna", group.by = "age_sex")
# DimPlot(liver_filtered, reduction = "umap.rna", label = TRUE, label.size = 4, split.by = "age_sex") + NoLegend()
# 
DimPlot_scCustom(liver_filtered, reduction = "umap.rna", label = TRUE, label.size = 4, split_seurat = TRUE, split.by = "age_sex", repel = TRUE, ggplot_default_colors = TRUE) + NoLegend()
ggsave("fig/UMAP_split_by_patient.png", width = 11, height = 7)

# number of cells per patient
table(liver_filtered$sennet_id) # 27_M patient had very few cells post-filtering
```

![UMAP Grouped by Patient](fig/UMAP_groupby_patient.png)

![UMAP Split by Patient](fig/UMAP_split_by_patient.png)

### Plotting All Modal combined

```{r}
p1 <- DimPlot(liver_filtered, reduction = "umap.rna") + ggtitle("RNA")
p2 <- DimPlot(liver_filtered, reduction = "umap.atac") + ggtitle("ATAC")
p3 <- DimPlot(liver_filtered, reduction = "wnn.umap") + ggtitle("WNN")
p1 + p2 + p3 & NoLegend() & theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
ggsave("fig/UMAP_RNA_ATAC_WNN.png", width = 11, height = 5)

```

![UMAP All Modal](fig/UMAP_RNA_ATAC_WNN.png)

## Hepatocyte Sub-clustering

### Subset based on Hepatocyte cell type

```{r}
ident_names <- levels(liver_filtered)
hepatocyte <- subset(x = liver_filtered, idents = "Hepatocyte")

# RNA assay
DefaultAssay(hepatocyte) <- "RNA"
hepatocyte <- NormalizeData(hepatocyte)
hepatocyte <- FindVariableFeatures(hepatocyte, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000)
hepatocyte <- ScaleData(hepatocyte)
hepatocyte <- RunPCA(hepatocyte)

ElbowPlot(hepatocyte, ndims = 50)
N_PCS <- 30

hepatocyte <- RunUMAP(hepatocyte, 
                          dims = 1:N_PCS, 
                          reduction.name = 'umap.rna', 
                          reduction.key = 'rnaUMAP_')

# ATAC assay
DefaultAssay(hepatocyte) <- "ATAC"
hepatocyte <- RunTFIDF(hepatocyte)
hepatocyte <- FindTopFeatures(hepatocyte, min.cutoff = 'q0')
hepatocyte <- RunSVD(hepatocyte)
hepatocyte <- RunUMAP(hepatocyte, reduction = 'lsi', dims = 2:50, reduction.name = "umap.atac", reduction.key = "atacUMAP_")

# WNN
hepatocyte <- FindMultiModalNeighbors(hepatocyte, reduction.list = list("pca", "lsi"), dims.list = list(1:50, 2:50))
hepatocyte <- RunUMAP(hepatocyte, nn.name = "weighted.nn", reduction.name = "wnn.umap", reduction.key = "wnnUMAP_")
hepatocyte <- FindClusters(hepatocyte, graph.name = "wsnn", algorithm = 3, verbose = FALSE)
```

### Plotting Hepatocyte Subcluster

```{r}
# annotation
hepatocyte <- CloudAzimuth(hepatocyte)

# UMAP RNA by age_sex
DefaultAssay(hepatocyte) <- "RNA"
DimPlot(hepatocyte, reduction = 'umap.rna', group.by = "age_sex")
ggsave("fig/UMAP_hepatocyte_RNA_by_patient.png")

DefaultAssay(hepatocyte) <- "ATAC"
DimPlot(hepatocyte, reduction = 'umap.atac', group.by = 'age_sex')
ggsave("fig/UMAP_hepatocyte_ATAC.png")

saveRDS(hepatocyte, "data/hepatocyte_subcluster.rds")
```

![UMAP Hepatocyte (RNA)](fig/UMAP_hepatocyte_RNA_by_patient.png)

![UMAP hepatocyte (ATAC)](fig/UMAP_hepatocyte_ATAC.png)

### Module score

Score for zones along the liver (pericentral and periportal)

```{r}
Pericentral = c("CYP3A4", "CYP3A5", "CYP3A7", "CYP2E1", "GLUL")
Periportal = c("HAMP", "ASS1", "ALB", "CPS1")

DefaultAssay(hepatocyte) <- "RNA"

hepatocyte <- AddModuleScore(
  object = hepatocyte,
  features = Pericentral,
  name = "Pericentral"
)

hepatocyte <- AddModuleScore(
  object = hepatocyte,
  features = Periportal,
  name = "Periportal"
)

hepatocyte$zone_score <- hepatocyte$Pericentral1 - hepatocyte$Periportal1

# FeaturePlot(hepatocyte, features = "Periportal1", reduction = 'umap.rna')
# FeaturePlot(hepatocyte, features = "Periportal1", reduction = 'umap.rna')

RidgePlot(hepatocyte, features = "zone_score", group.by = "age_sex")
ggsave("fig/UMAP_hepatocyte_zone_score_ridgeplot.png")

VlnPlot(hepatocyte, features = "zone_score", group.by = "age_sex")
ggsave("fig/UMAP_hepatocyte_zone_score_boxplot.png")


# joint density plot
BiocManager::install("Nebulosa")
library(Nebulosa)

Plot_Density_Joint_Only(hepatocyte, features = c("Pericentral1", "Periportal1"), ) + 
  ggtitle("Single Cell Zonation with Age")
ggsave("fig/UMAP_zonation_density_plot.png")

```

![RidgePlot Zone Score](fig/UMAP_hepatocyte_zone_score_ridgeplot.png)

![Volcano Plot Zone Score](fig/UMAP_hepatocyte_zone_score_boxplot.png)

![Joint Density Plot (Zone Score)](fig/UMAP_zonation_density_plot.png)
